caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of an online presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content displayed is a visual map or diagram with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "developing models," "model & play," and others. A central image labeled "SHARE" is prominently featured, suggesting a theme of collaboration or dissemination of ideas. The background is dark, which helps highlight the colorful nodes and connections, making the information visually engaging. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, possibly aimed at teaching viewers about the process of creating and sharing models within a systems framework.
